headings.instructions: Use font-light for elegant headers, and font-extrabold for high-impact titles. Never use generic Inter.

mono.instructions: Use for raw data, virality scores, lead emails, and code snippets.

layouts_and_grids.dashboard_mode: High Density Grid (Mode B). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6).
layouts_and_grids.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense data.
layouts_and_grids.spacing: Generous on containers (p-6, p-8). Tight within widgets (p-3, p-4) to maximize data density.
layouts_and_grids.borders: Use border-collapse techniques or border-r border-b on grid items to expose the grid skeleton.

surfaces_and_micro_themes.global: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Expose the skeleton. The app should feel like a high-density machine.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.cards: Flat solid background, 1px hard border, absolutely NO soft shadows. Use sharp inner contrasts.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.headers: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10. Must have 1px delicate inner stroke.
surfaces_and_micro_themes.inputs: Flat, bg-transparent, border-border, focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary.

component_strategy.buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm). High contrast text. Kinetic hover states (e.g. slight rightward translation on hover for arrows).
component_strategy.tables: Shadcn Table. Monospaced font for data columns. High-contrast hover states on rows.
component_strategy.forms: Shadcn UI forms heavily customized. No native inputs. Sharp edges, clear focus states.
component_strategy.charts: Recharts wrapped in Shadcn chart UI. Use primary and secondary colors.
component_strategy.toast: Use Sonner (`/app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.jsx`). Dark theme out of the box.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST have explicitly set hover colors. Never rely on inheritance.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Specific transitions ONLY. transition-colors duration-200, transition-transform. NEVER use transition-all.
motion_and_interactions.lists: Staggered entrance animations for leads and generated posts.

images_and_media.rules: No placeholder URLs. Use provided images. Images should have a subtle greyscale or high-contrast filter to fit the dark tech theme if possible.

accessibility.contrast: Text must meet APCA/WCAG standards. Use pure white for primary text, muted_foreground for secondary.
accessibility.focus: All focusable elements must have focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='generate-post-btn').

universal_guidelines: NEVER use generic centered layouts. Asymmetry creates interest.
NEVER use AI assistant emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡.
Always use modern button styles (sharp or pill) with interaction animations.
Layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Ensure 'data-testid' is present on all interactive elements.
DO NOT use completely transparent backgrounds in headers or dropdowns. ALWAYS use solid or glassmorphism backgrounds to maintain readability.
Do not add global text-align: center to the app.
When displaying virality score, use mono font and color code.
instructions_to_main_agent: Update tailwind.config.js to include the exact colors provided in this JSON.
Import Manrope, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts in index.css.
Update CSS variables in index.css to match the dark theme colors.
Use Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for dense dashboards and developer tools.
Build the specific views: Onboarding, Leads Dashboard, Market Research, AI Post Generator, Insights, and Email Composer.
Ensure all HTML/JSX elements have the required 'data-testid' attributes.
Never use native inputs, select, or datepicker. Only use customized Shadcn UI components.
Do not create .tsx files, use .jsx instead since the project is JavaScript based.
